mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales signals improving household demand and near-term revenue revisions, causing higher S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when RSAFS growth is stronger.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest vintage available for 2009-11 was 352073.0
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce positive 20-day return rank IC above 0.03 in walk-forward tests, or if top-quintile RSAFS trend days underperform bottom-quintile days.

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment crosses into a severe-stress zone, rising joblessness signals weaker income, higher default risk, and lower expected earnings, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above 9.5% or rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest vintage available for 2009-11 was 10.0
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases and their mean return is not below the unconditional mean at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A near-zero federal funds rate combined with stable or rising CPI signals aggressive policy support without immediate deflation, compressing discount rates and causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS below 0.5% and CPIAUCSL 3-month change is nonnegative
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest vintage available for 2009-11 was 0.12
failure_condition: Reject if the joint FEDFUNDS-below-0.5 and nonnegative-CPI signal has a 60-day mean forward return below the unconditional mean or a walk-forward hit rate below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in industrial production signals improving capacity utilization and cyclical earnings momentum, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days after production growth turns upward.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest vintage available for 2009-11 was 99.4398
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO 3-month growth crossing above zero is followed by negative 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 50% of triggered cases or produces rank IC below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A turn upward in housing starts from depressed levels signals improving credit transmission, construction demand, and durable-goods spillovers, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST below 700 and 3-month change crosses above 0%
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest vintage available for 2009-10 was 529.0
failure_condition: Reject if depressed-level HOUST rebounds are not followed by above-median 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if the triggered mean return is below zero in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll contraction combined with rising unemployment signals that firms are still cutting labor costs because demand is weak, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is negative and UNRATE 3-month change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest vintage available for 2009-11 was 130996.0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint payroll-down and unemployment-up state has positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of observations or does not underperform the unconditional return distribution.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in the federal funds rate signals an active easing cycle that lowers discount rates and refinancing costs, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days after the rate decline is observed.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS 3-month change crosses below -0.25 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest vintage available for 2009-11 was 0.12
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS easing triggers have a 5-day forward hit rate below 50% or if average triggered 5-day returns are not greater than unconditional returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Real-activity confirmation occurs when retail sales and industrial production rise together; the joint signal indicates broad demand and output recovery, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month change is positive and INDPRO 3-month change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:latest 2009 vintages showed RSAFS and INDPRO available through 2009-11
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive RSAFS and INDPRO state fails to generate above-unconditional 60-day returns, or if either leg alone explains the full signal with no incremental interaction effect.
